examples: Fluorescent lights flickered, and then the room was blindingly bright.
Fluorescent lights flickered, and then the room was brilliantly, blindingly bright.
It was a compact fluorescent light bulb.

He was wearing dark trousers, which possibly had a logo on them or fluorescent markings.
